input_dict.question: Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M. and what other South Korean comprise a group created in 2015?
input_dict.source_summary: Monsta X includes the member Jooheon.
input_dict.target_summary: Monsta X is a South Korean boy group formed by Starship Entertainment through the survival show "No.Mercy" on Mnet in 2015. The group is composed of seven members: Jooheon, Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M. (Lee Joo-heon, known by the mononym Jooheon, is a South Korean rapper and songwriter and is listed as a member of Monsta X.)
input_dict.candidate_summary: Monsta X is a South Korean boy group formed by Starship Entertainment through the survival show "No.Mercy" on Mnet in 2015. The group is composed of seven members: Jooheon, Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M. (Lee Joo-heon, known by the mononym Jooheon, is a South Korean rapper and songwriter and is listed as a member of Monsta X.)
